title: Automated single cell isolation from suspension with computer vision.
author: Ungai-Salanki R Gerecsei T Furjes P Orgovan N Sandor N Holczer E Horvath R Szabo B
content: S-EPMC4746594 PMC4746594 Automated single cell isolation from suspension with computer vision. Current robots can manipulate only surface-attached cells seriously limiting the fields of their application for single cell handling. We developed a computer vision-based robot applying a motorized
